_capture_metadata.captured_from: Synthesized from the hermes-style emission shape — model produces well-formed `<tool_call>{json}</tool_call>` but the configured parser failed to extract it (e.g., user manually overrode to a non-hermes parser, or future Qwen3 variant emits this when our detector misroutes).
_capture_metadata.purpose: Defense-in-depth: even when our auto-detect picks the right parser today, future model variants might ship hermes JSON shape and we should recover gracefully if a misroute leaks it into content.
